claimComponent: bounded anomaly surviving simple baseline pressure
rivalTheory: simple baseline or selection effect explains the observation
expectedObservation: NR-CAND-050 weakens under a stronger baseline or rival artifact check.
expectedBaselineResult: stronger baseline explains part of signal
falsifier: Fresh holdout in Astrophysics open catalog anomaly structure matches the rival baseline or produces no nontrivial separation.
noEditRule: Frozen before execution; post-hoc prediction edits invalidate readiness scoring.
